description: Code generation, analysis, and development tools

questions.question: Generate a Python function that checks if a string is a palindrome
questions.expected_behavior: Return a working function with correct logic, handles edge cases
questions.scoring_rubric: Correct logic (4pts), edge cases handled (3pts), clean code (3pts)
variants: Write a palindrome checker function in Python
Create a function to determine if a given string reads the same forwards and backwards
Implement is_palindrome(s: str) -> bool in Python

questions.question: Explain the difference between async/await and threading in Python
questions.expected_behavior: Accurate explanation of concurrency models, GIL mention, use cases
variants: Compare asyncio and threading approaches in Python
When should I use async/await vs threads in Python?
What are the tradeoffs between threading and asyncio in Python?

questions.question: Find the bug in this code: def factorial(n): return n * factorial(n-1)
questions.expected_behavior: Identify missing base case, suggest fix with n <= 1 check
variants: What's wrong with this recursive factorial function?
Debug: def factorial(n): return n * factorial(n-1)

questions.question: Implement a rate limiter using the token bucket algorithm
questions.expected_behavior: Working implementation with configurable rate and burst, thread-safe
variants: Build a token bucket rate limiter class
Create a rate limiting mechanism using the token bucket pattern
